Documentation for setting up, using, embedding, and porting JerryScript, including API and internal design details.


## Files
- **[01.GETTING-STARTED.md](01.GETTING-STARTED.md.md)**: Instructions for setting up prerequisites, building, and testing JerryScript on Ubuntu 14.04+.
- **[02.API-REFERENCE.md](02.API-REFERENCE.md.md)**: Documentation for JerryScript API types, functions, and operations, including initialization, execution, and value manipulation.
- **[03.API-EXAMPLE.md](03.API-EXAMPLE.md.md)**: Guide for embedding JerryScript into applications, demonstrating API usage through JavaScript shell creation.
- **[04.INTERNALS.md](04.INTERNALS.md.md)**: Documentation of JerryScript's high-level design, parser, byte-code, virtual machine, and ECMA components.
- **[05.PORT-API.md](05.PORT-API.md.md)**: Documentation and example implementations for porting JerryScript's termination, I/O, and date functions.
